use_cases: Quantity selector for e-commerce product pages
Stepper control for multi-step form wizards
Simple counter for tracking items or scores
Basic quantity adjuster for shopping carts
ai_summary: A minimal atomic counter component featuring increment and decrement buttons with React state management. Displays a numeric value and responds to user clicks to adjust the count. Built with Tailwind CSS for clean, utility-driven styling suitable for any interface needing simple numeric input controls.
